queries.question: Provide a list of all jet bridge capacities and also provide the capacities of all stair cars used at terminal 2.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jet_bridge.Capacity
FROM Terminals JOIN Jet_bridge ON Terminals.Id = Jet_bridge.Terminal_id
UNION
SELECT Staircar.Capacity
FROM Terminals JOIN Staircar ON Terminals.Id = Staircar.Terminal_id
WHERE Terminals.Name = "Terminal 2"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?terminals a :Terminals .
    ?jet_bridge a :Jet_Bridges .
    ?jet_bridge p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
    ?jet_bridge p:Capacity ?capacity .
    BIND(?capacity AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?terminals a :Terminals .
    ?staircar a :Staircars .
    ?staircar p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
    ?staircar p:Capacity ?capacity .
    ?terminals p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Terminal 2")
    BIND(?capacity AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What are the capacities of jet bridges and stairways in Terminal 2?
queries.sql:
SELECT Jet_bridge.Capacity
FROM Terminals JOIN Jet_bridge ON Terminals.Id = Jet_bridge.Terminal_id
WHERE Terminals.Name = "Terminal 2"
UNION
SELECT Staircar.Capacity
FROM Terminals JOIN Staircar ON Terminals.Id = Staircar.Terminal_id
WHERE Terminals.Name = "Terminal 2"
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {

    ?jet_bridge a :Jet_Bridges .
    ?jet_bridge p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
    ?jet_bridge p:Capacity ?capacity .
    ?terminals p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Terminal 2")
    BIND(?capacity AS ?o0)

  UNION
  {
    ?terminals a :Terminals .
    ?staircar a :Staircars .
    ?staircar p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
    ?staircar p:Capacity ?capacity .
    ?terminals p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Terminal 2")
    BIND(?capacity AS ?o0)

}
